title: Active discovery seekers need relevant novelty—not maximum novelty.
objective: Define the primary user through observable behavior and clarify the comfort-versus-exploration job.

content.segment_warning: These are model-inferred behavioral labels, not demographics or market size. Reddit’s long-form complaint format overrepresents detailed power-user behavior.

persona.name: Asha, the active discovery seeker
persona.context: Established listening history, several playlists, deliberately seeks unfamiliar artists or sounds
persona.trigger: The current rotation feels stale or does not match this moment
persona.goal: Find something unfamiliar enough to explore and recognizable enough to fit now
pains: Familiar or overly similar tracks dominate
Temporary listening can distort the persistent profile
Correction controls feel weak or invisible
External discovery and manual playlist work add effort
behaviors: Uses Discover Weekly, radio, Daylist, Smart Shuffle, and search
Skips recurring tracks and falls back to familiar playlists
Uses private sessions, exclusions, friends, Shazam, Reddit, or other services
Accepts some misses when the exploration feels purposeful
success_criteria: At least one save-worthy unfamiliar artist
Setup is shorter than external discovery work

content.jtbd: When I want music beyond my current rotation, help me find unfamiliar options that fit what I want right now, so I can explore without losing relevance or training my long-term profile by trial and error.
content.counter_segment: Casual or comfort-first listeners may prefer low-effort familiarity. Novelty must be adjustable and never forced.

visuals.alt: Proto-persona for an active discovery seeker with trigger, job, behaviors, pains, and success criteria.

speaker_notes: Recruit by observable behavior, not the classifier label ‘power user.’
Include one or two users for whom discovery works well; they are diagnostic counterexamples.
The product tension is controllable distance from familiarity, not novelty at any cost.

sources.label: Artifact B target user and JTBD
